audit.emptyFiltered: No rows (or nothing matches the filters).
audit.filtersHint: Filters apply to the current page only.
audit.title: Audit log
checkIn.extensionBanner: Check-in is within 48 hours. Complete required regional settings extension fields on the guest profile before arrival.
countryPack.noPermission: Only owner and manager can change the regional settings.
countryPack.pickProperty: Select a property in the header first.
countryPack.intro: Choose a built-in regional profile (e.g. Thailand: THB, VAT 7%, service charge) and apply it to this hotel. Currency, timezone and default check-in/out times update from the profile.
countryPack.confirmBody: The hotel’s currency, timezone and tax rules will align with the selected profile. Existing folio lines may be recalculated when bookings or prices change.
countryPack.toastApplied: Regional settings applied. Tax lines will be recalculated when bookings are saved or prices change.
countryPack.noTaxLines: No tax lines in this profile.
countryPack.locked.title: Regional settings are locked
countryPack.locked.description: This hotel has {{count}} booking(s). The regional settings cannot be changed.
countryPack.onboardingHint: Cannot be changed after the first booking.
onboarding.pageSubtitle: Complete the steps in order. Progress is saved in your browser; you can reopen the checklist from the header next to the hotel selector.
onboarding.stepHotelDesc: Create your first property: name, timezone, currency, check-in and check-out times.
onboarding.stepCountryTaxesDesc: Choose your regional settings. It cannot be changed after the first booking.
onboarding.stepRoomTypesDesc: Add at least one room type (capacity, category name).
onboarding.stepRoomsDesc: Create physical rooms and link them to types.
onboarding.stepRatesDesc: Add a rate plan and set prices for room types on the rate calendar.
onboarding.stepFirstBookingDesc: On the occupancy grid, click a cell, set dates, rate and room to create a booking.
folio.chargeDialogDescription: Categories are configured under Settings. Do not add room stay here—change booking dates or rates instead.
folio.chargeRoomCategoryError: Use booking dates and rates for room charges, not a manual line in this category.
extensions.settings.intro: Webhook extensions registered for this tenant.
extensions.settings.noPermission: Only owner and manager can manage extensions.
extensions.create.title: New extension
extensions.create.countryCodeHint: Optional. Link extension to a regional profile (e.g. TH). Leave empty for all countries.
extensions.create.name: Name
extensions.create.err.codePattern: Use letters, numbers, underscores or hyphens (1–64 characters).
extensions.create.err.countryCode: Country must be a 2-letter ISO code or empty.
extensions.create.err.name: Name is required.
extensions.guest.sectionIntro: Values are stored on the guest profile and may be required before check-in.
extensions.guest.noSchemas: No extension UI schemas are available.
extensions.guest.emptyExtension: Extension “{{name}}” has no fields to edit.
settings.fernet.title: Secrets encryption key (Fernet)
settings.fernet.intro: Rotate only after deploying the new key to your environments; subscriptions are re-encrypted server-side.
settings.fernet.stepDeploy: Deploy the new key to the backend configuration first.
settings.fernet.stepRotate: Then run rotate here so stored webhook secrets are re-encrypted.
settings.fernet.confirmBody: This re-encrypts webhook signing secrets with the key you provide. Ensure the same key is already configured on the server.
settings.fernet.confirmIrreversible: If the key does not match server configuration, deliveries may fail until fixed.
board.emptyRoomTypes: No room categories for this property. Add room types in the system.
board.emptyRooms: No physical rooms for this property. Add rooms to show grid rows and bookings.
board.subtitle: Balances in the header, categories and rooms on the left. Period: <highlight>{{period}}</highlight>
board.unassignedLaneHint: Drag to a room row to assign a physical room.
booking.emails.title: Email history
booking.emails.empty: No emails have been sent for this booking yet.
booking.emails.subject: Subject
bookings.toastGuestMerged: Guest profile was matched to an existing record (merged).
bookings.toastFolioAfterDateChange: Stay dates updated. Folio and taxes were recalculated.
bookings.deleteConfirmDescription: This permanently removes the booking, folio lines, and linked payment records in OpenPMS. It cannot be undone.
bookings.deleteForbiddenTooltip: Bookings after check-in or check-out cannot be deleted.
bookings.salesTax.inclusiveHint: The amount above is the tax portion of the charges total for this sales-tax setting. Country-pack tax lines (VAT, service charge, etc.) are listed separately in folio.
bookings.dialogHint: Room type, rate plan and nightly prices are required for all nights.
bookings.err.conflictRooms: Not enough rooms for these dates (409).
bookings.err.names: Enter guest first and last name.
bookings.err.ratesMissing: No nightly rates for: {{dates}}. Set prices in Rates.
bookings.err.roomAndRate: Select room type and rate plan.
bookings.err.selectProperty: Select a property in the header.
bookings.filterEmpty: No matches on this page — clear search or switch page.
bookings.hint: All bookings for the last 90 days.
bookings.noRatePlans: No rate plans. Add them in <r>Rates</r>.
bookings.noRoomTypes: No room categories. Create one in <l>settings</l>.
bookings.pickProperty: Select a property in the header.
bookings.title: Bookings
brand.name: OpenPMS
dashboard.chartHint: Share of occupied rooms from availability (sum across categories).
dashboard.selectProperty: Select a property in the header to load metrics.
dashboard.subtitle: Operational metrics for today.
dashboard.title: Overview
dashboard.unpaidEmpty: No bookings with a positive balance.
guests.title: Guests
guests.deleteConfirmDescription: This permanently removes the guest profile. You must delete all bookings for this guest first.
guests.deleteDisabledHasBookings: Remove all bookings before deleting this guest.
hk.intro: Drag a card between columns or click to choose a status.
lang.label: Language
property.pick: Select a property in the header.
rates.createPlanRoles: Creating plans is limited to owner and manager; contact your hotel administrator if needed.
rates.defaultCancellationPolicy: Free cancellation up to 24 hours before check-in; later cancellation may be charged for the first night.
rates.deletePlanBody: Plan «{{name}}» and its rates on the server will be deleted. This cannot be undone.
rates.err.bulkOrder: End date cannot be before start date.
rates.err.bulkSelection: Select property, room category, and rate plan.
rates.err.priceNonNegative: Price must be a non-negative number.
rates.err.stayOrder: Max stay must be greater than or equal to min stay when both are set.
rates.err.selectProperty: Select a property in the header.
rates.forbidden403: Not allowed: only owner and manager can manage rate plans.
rates.introSeeBoard: For availability by day, see the <boardLink>board</boardLink>.
rates.needPlansRich: The price grid needs at least one rate plan (BAR, package, etc.). You can create one here or via <post>POST /rate-plans</post> in <docs>/docs</docs>.
rates.needRoomTypeRich: Create a room type first in <settingsLink>settings</settingsLink>.
rates.newPlanHint: The plan is added to the list and selected for the price grid.
rates.readOnlyPrices: Changing prices is limited to owner and manager.
rates.selectProperty: Select a property in the header to load room types, rate plans, and prices.
rates.stripHint: The grid lists every room category for the selected plan. The second line of each cell shows inventory (independent of the rate).
rates.stripHintWrite: Click a priced cell to edit one night (owner / manager).
rooms.deleteBody: Room «{{name}}» will be marked deleted (see API DELETE /rooms/{id}).
rooms.dialogNewDesc: Set category, name, and operational status.
rooms.duplicateNameHint: This room name matches another row—check your data.
rooms.forbidden403: Not allowed: only owner and manager can create rooms.
rooms.hint: Physical rooms for the selected property.
rooms.manageRolesHint: Creating rooms is limited to owner and manager.
rooms.needRoomTypeRich: Add at least one room type (category) first. <settingsLink>See settings</settingsLink>.
rooms.bulk.title: Bulk add rooms
rooms.bulk.description: Create many physical rooms in one request (POST /rooms/bulk).
rooms.bulk.err.rangeOrder: The end of the range must be greater than or equal to the start.
bookings.editGuestDescription: Changes are saved to the guest profile and appear on all bookings.
channex.description: Connect your Channex account and map room types and rate plans. Initial inventory sync is not run yet.
channex.syncQueued: Full availability sync has been queued.
channex.disconnectBody: This removes the Channex link and all room / rate mappings for this property.
channex.errors.connectIncomplete: Validate the key and select a Channex property.
channex.errors.loadRates: Could not load Channex rate plans.
channex.errors.loadRooms: Could not load Channex room types.
channex.createPropertyHint: Creates a property in Channex using this hotel’s name, currency, and time zone from OpenPMS.
channex.errors.noProperties: The key is valid but Channex returned no properties. Try the other environment (production vs sandbox), check account access, or create a property in Channex below.
channex.errors.noRateMappings: Select at least one rate plan mapping.
channex.errors.noRoomMappings: Map at least one OpenPMS room type to Channex.
channex.noChannexRooms: Channex returned no room types for this property.
channex.provisionFromOpenpms: Create room types in Channex from OpenPMS
channex.provisionFromOpenpmsHint: New Channex properties have no room categories. One click creates them from your OpenPMS categories (and rate plans from your OpenPMS rate plans). Already matching titles in Channex are left unchanged.
channex.provisionDone: Channex updated: {{rtCreated}} room type(s) created, {{rtSkipped}} skipped; {{rpCreated}} rate plan(s) created, {{rpSkipped}} skipped.
channex.noPermission: Channel Manager is limited to owner and manager.
channex.noRatePlans: No rate plans for this property. Create rate plans in Rates / settings first.
channex.noRoomTypes: No room types for this property. Add categories under Property → Room types first.
channex.pickProperty: Select a property in the header.
channex.status.mapsLine: Room type mappings: {{rooms}}. Rate plan mappings: {{rates}}.
channex.status.title: Channex
channex.step2.intro: Match each OpenPMS room category to a Channex room type.
channex.step2.skipUnmapped: Rows left unmapped are not sent.
channex.step3.intro: For each room category, map OpenPMS rate plans to Channex rate plans.
channex.stepper.hint: Steps 2–3 are for mapping after the connection is saved — they are not separate buttons.
channex.title: Channel Manager (Channex)
stripe.addCard.missingPublishableKey: Set VITE_STRIPE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY in .env for card entry.
stripe.addCard.title: Add card
stripe.charge.title: Charge card
stripe.charges.title: Stripe payments
stripe.description: Connect a Stripe account to take card payments for this property (Stripe Connect).
stripe.disconnectBody: This revokes the Stripe connection for this property. Saved cards may stop working until you reconnect.
stripe.noPermission: Stripe settings are limited to owner and manager.
stripe.notConnected: Stripe is not connected for this property.
stripe.pickProperty: Select a property in the header.
stripe.refund.amountHelp: Leave empty for a full refund.
stripe.refund.title: Refund
stripe.status.title: Stripe
stripe.title: Payments (Stripe)
settings.apiKeys.deleteBody: This cannot be undone. Key «{{name}}» will be removed permanently.
settings.apiKeys.err.scopesRequired: Enter at least one scope, comma-separated.
settings.apiKeys.noPermission: API keys can be managed by owner and manager.
settings.apiKeys.saveKeyHint: The full value is shown only now.
settings.apiKeys.title: API keys
settings.err.baseOccupancy: Base occupancy must be a whole number ≥ 1.
settings.err.currencyInvalid: Currency: exactly 3 letters (e.g. USD, EUR, THB).
settings.err.forbiddenPropertyCreate: Not allowed: only owner and manager can create properties.
settings.err.forbiddenPropertyUpdate: Not allowed: only owner and manager can update properties.
settings.err.forbiddenRoomTypeCreate: Not allowed: only owner and manager can create room types.
settings.err.maxLtBase: Max occupancy cannot be less than base.
settings.err.maxOccupancy: Max occupancy must be a whole number ≥ 1.
settings.err.propertyNotFound: Property not found or not in your organization.
settings.err.propertyPatch405: Server does not support PATCH for property (405). A different method or API version is required.
settings.err.selectPropertyHeader: Select a property in the header.
settings.password.err.generic: Check your current password and try again.
settings.password.err.mismatch: New password and confirmation do not match.
settings.password.title: Account password
settings.property.createHint: New properties are created via the API. Select a property in the header to edit an existing one.
settings.property.editHint: You are editing the property selected in the header.
settings.property.noPermission: Creating properties is limited to owner and manager. Contact your tenant administrator.
settings.roles.descHousekeeping: Housekeeping status and the Housekeeping board.
settings.roles.descManager: Day-to-day bookings, rooms, and rates; cannot change the tenant owner.
settings.roles.descOwner: Full access to properties, rates, users, and integrations.
settings.roles.descReception: Bookings, guests, folios, and the allocation grid.
settings.roles.intro: Reference for the OpenPMS access model (assign via user invitations below).
settings.folioCategories.title: Folio charge categories
settings.folioCategories.intro: Codes and labels for manual folio charges (tenant-wide). Built-in codes cannot be deleted.
settings.folioCategories.builtinHint: Built-in code; it cannot be changed or removed.
settings.folioCategories.errOrder: Sort order must be a number.
settings.folioCategories.codeHint: Lowercase letters, digits and `_`; 1–32 chars, must start with a letter.
settings.folioCategories.errCodeFormat: Code must use lowercase letters, digits and `_` (1–32 chars, starts with a letter).
settings.roomTypes.intro: Categories for the selected property’s physical rooms.
settings.roomTypes.noPermission: Creating room types is limited to owner and manager.
settings.roomTypes.pickProperty: Select a property in the header to add or view room types.
settings.roomTypesTable.deleteBody: Category «{{name}}» will be marked deleted on the server.
settings.roomTypesTable.empty: No categories yet. Add the first one using the form above.
settings.roomTypesTable.name: Name
settings.subtitle: Sections below connect OpenPMS step by step (users, keys, webhooks, properties).
settings.notifications.intro: Branding and defaults for transactional emails to guests (Resend). Save settings before sending a test.
settings.notifications.noPermission: Only owner and manager can change email notification settings.
settings.notifications.pickProperty: Select a property in the header first.
settings.notifications.title: Guest emails
settings.billing.intro: Configure how sales tax appears on booking receipts. Persisted via PUT /properties/{id}/tax-config (tax_rate as a fraction 0–1, e.g. 0.07).
settings.billing.noPermission: Only owner and manager can change billing tax settings.
settings.billing.pickProperty: Select a property in the header first.
settings.billing.rateInvalid: Enter a valid percentage between 0 and 100.
settings.billing.savedLocalOnly: Saved in this browser only — the API rejected the payload. Ensure PUT /properties/{id}/tax-config is deployed.
settings.billing.title: Sales tax (receipt)
settings.billing.scopeHint: This mode applies only to the single-rate sales tax configured here (receipt breakdown). Country-pack taxes (e.g. Thailand VAT 7% + service charge 10%) are always calculated from the pack rules — configure them under Settings → Property → Country pack.
settings.success.propertyCreated: Property created. It is selected in the header switcher.
settings.title: Settings
settings.users.inviteHint: To re-invite someone, contact an administrator.
settings.users.noPermission: The list and invitations are available to owner and manager.
settings.users.tempPasswordHint: Share a one-time password with {{email}}. Ask them to change it on next sign-in.
settings.users.title: Users
settings.webhooks.noPermission: Subscriptions are configured by owner and manager.
settings.webhooks.secretHint: Use to verify HMAC. Save it — we will not show it again.
settings.webhooks.title: Webhooks
